recommendations.title: A Most Wanted Man
recommendations.overview: A Chechen Muslim illegally immigrates to Hamburg and becomes a person of interest for a covert government team tracking the movements of potential terrorists.

recommendations.title: The American
recommendations.overview: Dispatched to a small Italian town to await further orders, assassin Jack embarks on a double life that may be more relaxing than is good for him.

recommendations.title: Life
recommendations.overview: In 1955, young photographer Dennis Stock develops a close bond with actor James Dean while shooting pictures of the rising Hollywood star.

recommendations.title: Prisoners
recommendations.overview: Keller Dover is facing every parent’s worst nightmare. His six-year-old daughter, Anna, is missing, together with her young friend, Joy, and as minutes turn to hours, panic sets in. The only lead is a dilapidated RV that had earlier been parked on th

recommendations.title: Inside Out
recommendations.overview: When 11-year-old Riley moves to a new city, her Emotions team up to help her through the transition. Joy, Fear, Anger, Disgust and Sadness work together, but when Joy and Sadness get lost, they must journey through unfamiliar places to get back home.

recommendations.title: Pink Floyd: Pulse
recommendations.overview: Live performance from the legendary band, recorded live at Earls Court in London on 20th October 1994, during The Division Bell tour.

recommendations.title: The Doors
recommendations.overview: The story of the famous and influential 1960s rock band and its lead singer and composer, Jim Morrison.

recommendations.title: Age of Heroes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the formation of Ian Fleming's 30 Commando unit, a precursor for the elite forces in the U.K.

recommendations.title: When I'm Young
recommendations.overview: 70-year-old Malena gets a second chance at life when she magically turns into her 22-year-old self. Now, posing as "Maria" to hide her true identity, she becomes the lead singer of her grandson's band and tries to recover her dream of singing, which

recommendations.title: Burn the Stage: The Movie
